subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Tree doth call out upon the Crimson Spot, summoning all unto God, the Lord of Names, thus doth it testify [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان السدره تنادی علی البقعه الحمرآء و یدع الکل الی الله مالک الاسماء یشهد بذلک
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Manifestation of God as sun
